name: Memory Load
description: Before any task execution, remind Kiro to read memory blocks and canon data for context continuity.

then.prompt: Before executing this task, read these files for context: docs/MEMORY-BLOCKS.md, .kiro/steering/mystermyself-automation.md, data/canon/scott-king-coast.json, data/ops/route-map.json, data/ops/funnel-map.json, data/ops/social-links.json. Continue from the current spec status at .kiro/specs/ops-004b-full-mvp-funnel-build/status.md. Do not start over. Do not invent new canon.
